mapper.update: UPDATE ai_memory_record SET content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, facts_json = #{factsJson}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_turn = #{sourceTurn}, confidence = #{confidence}, hit_count = #{hitCount}, version = #{version}, status = #{status}, ttl_at = #{ttlAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, conversation_id, level, scope, content, summary, facts_json, source_type, source_turn, confidence, hit_count, version, status, ttl_at, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_memory_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (ttl_at IS NULL OR ttl_at > NOW()) AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, conversation_id, level, scope, content, summary, facts_json, source_type, source_turn, confidence, hit_count, version, status, ttl_at, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_memory_record WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND level IN ('L1', 'L2') AND (ttl_at IS NULL OR ttl_at > NOW()) AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id, conversation_id, level, scope, content, summary, facts_json, source_type, source_turn, confidence, hit_count, version, status, ttl_at, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_memory_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND level = 'L3' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (ttl_at IS NULL OR ttl_at > NOW()) AND ( content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR facts_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY confidence DESC, updated_at DESC, hit_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, user_id, conversation_id, level, scope, content, summary, facts_json, source_type, source_turn, confidence, hit_count, version, status, ttl_at, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_memory_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND content = #{content} AND level = 'L3' AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
